summary: VenuLock Typography & UI Refinement Testing Complete. All 20 features tested PASS. Verified: (1) EB Garamond serif font for all section headings, (2) DM Sans for UI text, (3) VENU|LOCK wordmark with gold separator (#C8A960/50), (4) Gold accent line on search card, (5) Sharp corners (0px border-radius) on all cards, (6) Uppercase CTAs with letter-spacing, (7) Profile images remain circular (9999px radius).
critical_code_review_comments: EB Garamond serif font correctly applied to all section headings (How It Works, Top Performers, Platform Capabilities, Browse by City, Work With Us, Final CTA)
DM Sans applied to body text and UI elements
Gold separator (#C8A960/50) in VENU|LOCK wordmark - thin vertical line between VENU and LOCK
Gold accent line (2px, rgb(200, 169, 96)) at top of search card
All cards have sharp corners (0px border-radius): capability cards, city cards, Work With Us cards, Top Performer cards
Profile images correctly remain circular (border-radius: 9999px) - exception to sharp corners rule
CTA buttons uppercase with tracking: Explore Venues (1.32px), Get Started (1.1px), Start Booking (0.88px)
Trust strip shows 4 indicators on desktop (Negotiation, Verified Venues, Real-Time Availability, Secure Transactions)
Mobile trust strip shows 3 indicators (500+ Venues, Verified Partners, Escrow Protected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Typography/UI refinement complete. Key verified changes: (1) EB Garamond serif font for headlines, (2) DM Sans for UI text, (3) VENU|LOCK wordmark gold separator, (4) Gold accent line on search card, (5) Sharp corners (0px) on all cards except profile images, (6) Uppercase CTAs with letter-spacing. All sections render correctly on desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px/390px).

desktop_view_1920px.trust_strip_4_indicators: PASS - Negotiation Included, Verified Venues Only, Real-Time Availability, Secure Transactions
desktop_view_1920px.top_performers_3_cards: PASS - 3 RM cards with rank badges
desktop_view_1920px.work_with_us_cards: PASS - List Venue and Partner cards visible
desktop_view_1920px.final_cta_buttons: PASS - Start Booking and Connect buttons
desktop_view_1920px.footer_links: PASS - browse-venues, contact, support, privacy, terms all present

mobile_view_375px.hamburger_menu: PASS - Opens with Sign In, Browse Venues, List Your Venue, Get Started
